reasoning: The ON RRP Award rate (RRPONTSYAWARD) is an administered rate set by the FOMC and does not fluctuate on a daily basis (as shown by exactly 3.5% across late January 2026). The Federal Reserve just concluded its first 2026 meeting on Jan 27-28 and kept the rate at 3.5%. The next scheduled FOMC meeting is not until March 17-18, 2026. Because both resolution dates (Feb 8 and Mar 3) fall before the next FOMC meeting, the rate is virtually guaranteed to remain flat at 3.5%. The only scenario for an increase would be an emergency inter-meeting rate hike, which is extraordinarily unlikely, especially in a cutting cycle where rates have moved downward over the past year. Thus, probabilities are assigned near the technical minimums allowable.
